title: Code quality score 0.73 — type assertions and non-null assertions reduce type safety
evidence: app.ts:14 `as Record<string, unknown>`, app.ts:66 `as Book`, app.ts:63 `value!.title` — multiple `as` casts and `!` non-null assertions throughout app.ts
suggestion: Use type guards or runtime validation library to avoid unsafe casts; replace non-null assertions with proper narrowing
